pages.title: Melee Weapons
pages.text: $(b)Swords & Axes$() - Attack adjacent enemies (range 1). Damage scales with weapon tier:$(br)$(li)Wood/Gold: base damage$(br)$(li)Stone: +1$(br)$(li)Iron: +2$(br)$(li)Diamond: +3$(br)$(li)Netherite: +4$(br2)Axes deal slightly more damage but are slower.

pages.title: Ranged Weapons
pages.text: $(b)Bows & Crossbows$() - Attack from distance (range 3-4). Require arrows in your inventory. Each shot consumes one arrow.$(br2)$(b)Tridents$() - Melee stab (1 AP) when adjacent, or throw (2 AP) in straight/diagonal lines. Thrown tridents lodge in the ground and must be retrieved. $(b)Loyalty$() returns it. $(b)Riptide$() dashes through enemies. $(b)Channeling$() strikes lightning.$(br2)$(b)Eggs & Snowballs$() - Low damage but can be used as items (right-click).
